mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_posts ( company_profile_id, title, description, responsibilities, qualifications, preferred_qualifications, employment_type, experience_level, min_career_years, max_career_years, location, work_type, salary_min, salary_max, salary_negotiable, deadline, status ) VALUES ( #{companyProfileId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{responsibilities}, #{qualifications}, #{preferredQualifications}, #{employmentType}, #{experienceLevel}, #{minCareerYears}, #{maxCareerYears}, #{location}, #{workType}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{salaryNegotiable}, #{deadline}, #{status} )
INSERT INTO job_post_sap_skills (job_post_id, sap_skill_id, is_required) VALUES (#{jobPostId}, #{sapSkillId}, TRUE)
mapper.select: SELECT jp.id, cp.company_name AS company, jp.location, jp.title, COALESCE(STRING_AGG(jt.tag_name, ',' ORDER BY jt.id), '') AS tags_csv, jp.deadline, jp.salary_min, jp.salary_max, jp.salary_negotiable, jp.created_at FROM job_posts jp JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id LEFT JOIN job_tags jt ON jt.job_post_id = jp.id WHERE jp.status = 'OPEN' AND jp.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY jp.id, cp.company_name, jp.location, jp.title, jp.deadline, jp.salary_min, jp.salary_max, jp.salary_negotiable, jp.created_at ORDER BY jp.created_at DESC, jp.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT jp.id, cp.company_name AS company, jp.title, jp.location, jp.employment_type, jp.experience_level, jp.min_career_years, jp.max_career_years, jp.work_type, jp.salary_min, jp.salary_max, jp.salary_negotiable, jp.deadline, jp.view_count, COALESCE(tags.tags_csv, '') AS tags_csv, COALESCE(skills.skills_csv, '') AS skills_csv, jp.description, jp.responsibilities, jp.qualifications, jp.preferred_qualifications FROM job_posts jp JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT job_post_id, STRING_AGG(tag_name, ',' ORDER BY id) AS tags_csv FROM job_tags GROUP BY job_post_id ) tags ON tags.job_post_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT jps.job_post_id, STRING_AGG(ss.name, ',' ORDER BY jps.id) AS skills_csv FROM job_post_sap_skills jps JOIN sap_skills ss ON ss.id = jps.sap_skill_id GROUP BY jps.job_post_id ) skills ON skills.job_post_id = jp.id WHERE jp.id = #{id} AND jp.status = 'OPEN' AND jp.deleted_at IS NULL
